title: Senior Citizen Tuition Waiver
content:
Senior Citizen Tuition Waiver
Morgan State University - Office of the Registrar

This guide is for STUDENTS (senior citizens). It explains how to apply for a tuition waiver based on senior citizen status.

Contact: records@morgan.edu

---

STEP 1: GATHER REQUIRED DOCUMENTATION

Proof of Age (one of the following):
- Marriage License
- Passport
- Driver's License
- Birth Certificate
- Driver's Permit
- State ID
- Military ID

Proof of Retirement Income (one of the following, dated within the last year):
- Benefit statement
- Benefit deposit

---

STEP 2: ENTER SEMESTER AND YEAR
Enter the semester and year for which you are requesting the waiver. Do not use abbreviations (for example, write "Fall 2025" not "FA25").

IMPORTANT:
- Waivers cannot be applied retroactively.
- Waivers are not offered for winter terms.

---

STEP 3: ENTER COURSE AND CREDIT INFORMATION
Enter the courses you are registered for and the total number of credits to be waived. The maximum number of credits that can be waived is 9.

---

STEP 4: ATTACH DOCUMENTATION
Upload your government-issued photo ID and proof of retirement income.

---

STEP 5: SUBMIT
Submit the form. Processing takes up to 10 business days.

For the full official guide with screenshots, view: [Senior Citizen Tuition Waiver Guide](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1ahCzHUAWESnIHeATKa_eBOvNNhG5aIBb/view)
